customManagers.description: Update SwiftFormat binary target URL and checksum in Package.swift
customManagers.autoReplaceStringTemplate:
{{{indentation}}}// renovate: datasource={{{datasource}}} depName={{{depName}}} versioning={{{versioning}}}
{{{indentation}}}.binaryTarget(
{{{indentation}}}    name: "swiftformat",
{{{indentation}}}    url: "https://github.com/{{{packageName}}}/releases/download/{{{newValue}}}/swiftformat.artifactbundle.zip",
{{{indentation}}}    checksum: "{{{newDigest}}}"
{{{indentation}}}),

packageRules.description: Keep SwiftPM dependency ranges stable for this library package
